allow: PowerShell($root = "C:\\Projetos\\Naruto Game\\naruto-os-pergaminhos-de-asura"; Write-Output "=== Files ==="; Get-ChildItem "$root\\project.godot","$root\\scripts\\player\\player_controller.gd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "{0}  \({1} bytes\)" -f $_.FullName, $_.Length }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Inputs em project.godot ==="; Select-String -Path "$root\\project.godot" -Pattern "^\(attack_light|attack_heavy|special|chakra_charge\)=" | ForEach-Object { "L{0}: {1}" -f $_.LineNumber, $_.Line }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Estados de combate em player_controller.gd ==="; Select-String -Path "$root\\scripts\\player\\player_controller.gd" -Pattern "\(State\\.\(ATTACK|SPECIAL|CHAKRA_CHARGE\)|func _state_\(attack|special|chakra_charge\)|func _try_start_\(attack|special|chakra_charge\)|func _enable_attack_hitbox|func _disable_attack_hitbox\)" | Select-Object -First 25 | ForEach-Object { "L{0}: {1}" -f $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.Trim\(\) })

PowerShell($sub = "C:\\Projetos\\Naruto Game\\naruto-os-pergaminhos-de-asura"; if \(Test-Path $sub\) { $contents = Get-ChildItem $sub -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($contents.Count -eq 0\) { Remove-Item $sub -Force; Write-Output "DELETADA \(estava vazia\)" } else { Write-Output "NAO DELETEI - tem conteudo:"; $contents | Format-List Name } } else { Write-Output "JA NAO EXISTE" })
